channel.title: Keycaps & Aesthetics · keyboard wire
channel.description: Keycap sets and group buys, profile discussion, switches for sound/feel, lubing, foam, lighting, finishes, photographs of finished boards.

item.title: You may not like it, but THIS is peak split keyboard
item.description: High-engagement photo/post showcasing an eye-catching split build — good visibility in the community. — 67 pts · 0 comments · r/ErgoMechKeyboards
